subject: FW: long time, no talk...
body:
Hi Reid,

per my vm, I'm chasing a few DC-related legal stories and was hoping you might be able to help me out.

Got any time in the next few days?

Thanks,

Greg

p.s. Any word from Bernie E? Given Skilling's reduction, Bernie certainly deserves a second look, no?
